title.en: Cauliflower cultivation — up-country recommendation (Nuwara Eliya-split schedule)
title.si: මල් ගෝවා වගාව — උඩරට නිර්දේශය (නුවරඑළිය වෙනස් පොහොර කාල සටහන)
title.ta: காலிஃபிளவர் பயிர்ச்செய்கை — மலைநாடு பரிந்துரை (நுவரெலியா தனி உர அட்டவணை)

summary.en: HORDI recommendation for cauliflower (Brassica oleracea var. botrytis). Varieties: Early Phenomenal and Early Patna. Grows in all zones with appropriate variety choice. Spacing 40–50 × 40 cm; seed rate 300 g/ha; soil pH 6.0–6.8. Two distinct fertilizer schedules: Nuwara Eliya skips basal urea (soils already have high organic N) and runs urea at weeks 2 / 5 / 8; other districts use standard basal + two top-dressings. Harvest 60–75 days after transplant. Yield 6.0–9.0 t/ha.
summary.si: මල් ගෝවා (Brassica oleracea var. botrytis) සඳහා HORDI නිර්දේශය. ප්‍රභේද: Early Phenomenal සහ Early Patna. සුදුසු ප්‍රභේදය තේරීමෙන් සියලු කලාපවල වැඩේ. පරතරය 40-50 × 40 cm; බීජ මාත්‍රාව 300 g/ha; පස් pH 6.0-6.8. රෝපණයෙන් දින 60-75 කින් අස්වනු. අස්වැන්න ටොන් 6.0-9.0/හෙ.
summary.ta: காலிஃபிளவர் (Brassica oleracea var. botrytis) பயிர்ச்செய்கைக்கான HORDI பரிந்துரை. வகைகள்: Early Phenomenal மற்றும் Early Patna. பொருத்தமான வகை தேர்வுடன் அனைத்து வலயங்களிலும் வளரும். இடைவெளி 40-50 × 40 cm; விதை அளவு 300 g/ha; மண் pH 6.0-6.8. நடவு செய்த 60-75 நாட்களில் அறுவடை. மகசூல் 6.0-9.0 டன்/ஹெக்டேர்.

field_provenance.notes: Plan encodes the 'other districts' schedule as the primary activity track. The Nuwara Eliya-specific schedule (no basal urea; urea at 2/5/8 weeks) is captured in a paired knowledge chunk so the UI can show both.

body.en: Soil pH 6.0–6.8. Prepare raised beds at 40–50 × 40 cm spacing. For Nuwara Eliya soils, check organic matter first — the paired knowledge chunk covers the alternative schedule.
Transplant seedlings at 40–50 cm between rows × 40 cm within. Seed rate in the nursery 300 g/ha equivalent.
Harvest when curds are compact and white. 60–75 days after transplant. Yield 6–9 t/ha.

notes.en: Diamondback moth (Plutella xylostella) — same management as cabbage: Emamectin benzoate 5% SG 8 g/16 L, or Chlorantraniliprole 200 g/L SC 6 ml/16 L. Rotate MOAs between applications.
Cabbage looper. Spinosad 25 g/L SC 16 ml/16 L or Tebufenozide 200 g/L SC 24 ml/16 L (same as cabbage regime).
Black cutworm at establishment. Profenophos 500 g/L EC 32 ml/16 L or Etofenprox 100 g/L EC 24 ml/16 L.
Club root (Plasmodiophora brassicae). Apply lime to raise pH; rotate 3+ years with non-brassicas; plant disease-free seedlings. No chemical cure.
Black rot (Xanthomonas campestris). Use disease-free seed; avoid overhead irrigation; hot-water seed treatment; copper-based bactericide per DOA 2019 recommendation.
Downy mildew. Apply recommended fungicides at first symptoms per DOA 2019 pesticide recommendation.
